column2: Post-Trial Evidence Preservation and Authorisation Close-Out Test
column3: ['Verify that the trial supervisor is responsible for post-trial evidence preservation and authorization close-out. ', 'Confirm that the T&E activity has been carried out safely according to the direction of the T&E approvals board. ', 'Verify that the trial supervisor documents lessons-learned evidence preservation. ', 'Confirm that the trial supervisor initiates the authorization close-out process. ', 'Verify correct preservation of post-trial lessons-learned evidence. ', 'Confirm successful completion of the authorization close-out process. ']
column4: ["The trial supervisor's role within the organization or documentation confirms their responsibility. ", 'Relevant documents, such as safety protocols and approval board directives, show compliance with the required safety standards. ', 'A record or documentation of lessons learned from previous T&E activities is found. ', 'The necessary steps to start the authorization close-out process, such as submitting required documents or notifications, have been taken. ', 'The documented lessons learned are properly stored and accessible for future reference. ', 'All necessary steps have been completed, such as receiving approval from relevant authorities or completing required paperwork. ']
